sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42849" key="e)rwtia/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρωτ-ιάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, pecul. fem. of <sense id="n42849.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐρωτικός, Νύμφαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.627</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marian.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
